site.title: Scoold
site.tagline: The most efficient way to share knowledge within your team or organization
site.description: Scoold is open source and works great as a Q&A platform, forum, knowledge base or customer support tool. Deploy on-premises or to any cloud in minutes.

hero.title: The smarter way to share
hero.subtitle: Scoold is a self-hosted Q&A platform, forum, and knowledge base built for teams and enterprises. Deploy on-premises or to any cloud — fully under your control.

features_overview.title: Everything your team needs to
features_overview.subtitle: Packed with powerful features designed to help your team capture, organize, and share knowledge effectively.

items.title: Full-text Search
items.description: Every question, answer, and comment is indexed for fast, accurate search. Find knowledge in seconds, not hours.

items.title: Enterprise SSO
items.description: LDAP, SAML 2.0, and SCIM support for seamless integration with your existing identity provider and directory.

items.title: Reputation & Badges
items.description: Built-in gamification with reputation points, achievement badges, and leaderboards to incentivize participation.

items.title: On-Premises Deploy
items.description: Keep your data in your own infrastructure. Deploy as a Docker container, JAR, or to any cloud provider.

items.title: REST API
items.description: Full-featured REST API for integrations, custom automations, and embedding Scoold content in your existing tools.

items.title: Multi-space Support
items.description: Create separate spaces for different teams, departments, or projects — all from a single Scoold instance. (Pro)

features_page.title: Features built for enterprise knowledge sharing
features_page.subtitle: From full-text search to enterprise SSO, Scoold provides everything you need to build a world-class internal knowledge platform.

features.title: Question & Answer
features.description: Stack Overflow-style Q&A with voting, accepted answers, and commenting.

features.title: Full-text Search
features.description: Blazing-fast search across all content with typo tolerance and relevance ranking.

features.title: Tags & Categories
features.description: Organize content with tags, wikis, and structured hierarchies.

features.title: Markdown Editor
features.description: Rich Markdown editor with code syntax highlighting, image embedding, and preview.

features.title: Email Notifications
features.description: Configurable email notifications for answers, comments, and mentions.

features.title: Activity Feed
features.description: Real-time activity feed showing recent questions, answers, and community activity.

features.title: LDAP Integration
features.description: Connect to your Active Directory or any LDAP server for centralized user management.

features.title: SAML 2.0 SSO
features.description: Single sign-on with Okta, Azure AD, Auth0, and all major SAML identity providers.

features.title: SCIM Provisioning
features.description: Automatic user provisioning and deprovisioning via the SCIM protocol.

features.title: Role-based Access Control
features.description: Fine-grained permissions: admins, moderators, power users, and read-only roles.

features.title: Audit Logs
features.description: Complete audit trail of all administrative actions and content changes.

features.title: Data Isolation
features.description: Your data never leaves your infrastructure. Full on-premises deployment supported.

features.title: REST API
features.description: Full-featured REST API with OpenAPI 3.x specification for custom integrations.

features.title: Slack Integration
features.description: Post new questions to Slack channels. Answer and interact with Scoold from Slack.

features.title: Microsoft Teams
features.description: Native Teams bot and connector for seamless knowledge sharing in your Teams workspace.

features.title: Mattermost
features.description: Webhook-based integration with self-hosted Mattermost instances.

features.title: Zapier
features.description: Connect Scoold to 5,000+ apps with Zapier — no code required.

features.title: Webhooks
features.description: HTTP webhooks for all major events: new questions, answers, votes, and more.

features.title: Docker Support
features.description: Official Docker image for rapid deployment. Run with a single docker-compose command.

features.title: Cloud Ready
features.description: Deploy to AWS, Azure, GCP, Heroku, Render, or any cloud provider that supports Docker.

features.title: High Availability
features.description: Clustered deployments with load balancing for enterprise-grade uptime. (Pro)

features.title: Multi-space
features.description: Separate knowledge spaces for different teams, projects, or customer segments. (Pro)

features.title: White-labeling
features.description: Custom branding, logo, colors, and domain name for a seamless company experience. (Pro)

features.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Usage metrics, engagement stats, and content health reports. (Pro)

pricing.title: Simple, transparent
pricing.subtitle: No subscriptions. No per-seat fees. A one-time license that's yours forever.
pricing.note: All plans include free updates for 12 months. Pro licenses valid for unlimited users on a single production instance.

plans.name: Community
plans.description: Everything you need to get started. Self-hosted, open source, Apache 2.0.

plans.name: Scoold Pro
plans.description: The complete enterprise package. LDAP, SAML, SCIM, multi-space, and priority support.

plans.name: Pro + Source
plans.description: Full Pro features plus complete access to the Scoold Pro source code.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Scoold. Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.

items.q: What is Scoold and how is it different from Scoold Pro?
items.a: Scoold is an open-source Q&A and knowledge base platform licensed under Apache 2.0. It's completely free and self-hosted. Scoold Pro is a commercial edition that adds enterprise features like LDAP, SAML SSO, SCIM provisioning, multi-space support, analytics, and priority support. Both share the same core codebase.

items.q: Can I use Scoold on-premises or in my private cloud?
items.a: Absolutely. Scoold is designed for self-hosted deployment. You can run it as a Docker container, a standalone JAR, or deploy it to AWS, Azure, GCP, or any other cloud provider. Your data never leaves your infrastructure.

items.q: What identity providers are supported for SSO?
items.a: Scoold Pro supports SAML 2.0 SSO with any compliant identity provider, including Okta, Azure Active Directory, Auth0, OneLogin, Ping Identity, and Google Workspace. LDAP and Active Directory integration is also available for on-premises environments.

items.q: How does licensing work for Scoold Pro?
items.a: Scoold Pro uses a one-time perpetual license model. You pay once (€499) and own the license forever with no per-seat or subscription fees. The license covers a single production instance with unlimited users. Updates are free for 12 months.

items.q: Is there a trial or demo available?
items.a: Yes! You can try the live demo at demo.scoold.com — no account required. The Community edition is also free to download and run locally, so you can evaluate the full platform before purchasing Pro.

items.q: What technology does Scoold run on?
items.a: Scoold is a Java application built on top of Para — our open-source backend platform. It requires Java 11+ and a compatible database (Para supports DynamoDB, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, and others). Docker images are provided for easy setup.

items.q: Can I customize the look and feel?
items.a: Yes. The Community edition supports CSS customization. Scoold Pro adds full white-labeling: custom logo, brand colors, custom domain, and the ability to embed Scoold within your existing intranet or portal.

items.q: What kind of support is included?
items.a: Community edition users have access to the GitHub issues tracker and community forums. Scoold Pro includes priority email support with a 1-business-day response SLA. Pro + Source customers get a dedicated Slack channel and architecture consulting.

items.q: Does Scoold have a hosted cloud version?
items.a: Yes! Scoold Cloud is our fully managed hosted solution. We handle deployment, updates, backups, and security patches. Visit cloud.scoold.com to learn more about plans and pricing.

items.q: How do I migrate from Stack Overflow for Teams or Confluence?
items.a: Scoold provides import/export tools and a REST API that makes migration straightforward. We also offer professional migration services for Pro customers. Contact us to discuss your specific migration needs.

cta.title: Ready to build your team's knowledge base?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of organizations using Scoold to capture and share knowledge effectively. Start free, scale when you're ready.

footer.tagline: The open-source Q&A and knowledge base platform for teams and enterprises.

knowledge_base.title: Scoold as a Knowledge Base
knowledge_base.subtitle: Capture, organize, and surface institutional knowledge before it walks out the door.
knowledge_base.description: Teams lose countless hours searching for answers that already exist somewhere. Scoold's searchable, structured knowledge base ensures the right information reaches the right person instantly.

features.title: Searchable Knowledge Repository
features.description: Every document, answer, and conversation is indexed and searchable. Typo tolerance and relevance ranking surface the right content first.

features.title: Structured with Tags & Wikis
features.description: Organize content by topic, team, product, or any taxonomy that fits your organization.

features.title: Expert Identification
features.description: Reputation system surfaces your internal experts. Know who to ask before you ask.

features.title: Version History
features.description: Full edit history for every article. Track who changed what and when.

community_forum.title: Scoold as a Community Forum
community_forum.subtitle: Build a thriving community around your product, project, or organization.
community_forum.description: Whether it's an open-source project, a SaaS product, or an internal guild, Scoold provides the discussion platform your community deserves — without the lock-in.

features.title: Threaded Discussions
features.description: Q&A format with threaded comments creates structured, searchable discussions instead of chat noise.

features.title: Reputation & Gamification
features.description: Points, badges, and leaderboards keep your community engaged and reward helpful contributors.

features.title: Open or Private
features.description: Public-facing community or private, login-required forum — your choice.

features.title: Self-hosted or Cloud
features.description: You own your community data. Deploy anywhere, migrate anytime.

developer_hub.title: Scoold as a Developer Hub
developer_hub.subtitle: Give your engineering team a dedicated space to ask, answer, and document technical knowledge.
developer_hub.description: Engineers spend too much time asking questions in Slack that disappear into history. Scoold creates a permanent, searchable record of technical knowledge that compounds over time.

features.title: Code-first Editor
features.description: Markdown with syntax highlighting for all major languages. Questions and answers look as good as your code.

features.title: Slack & Teams Integration
features.description: Questions asked in Slack can be automatically routed to Scoold for a permanent, searchable record.

features.title: API Documentation Hub
features.description: Use Scoold alongside your OpenAPI docs to handle developer Q&A.

features.title: Git & CI/CD Friendly
features.description: REST API enables integration into your developer workflows and toolchains.

support_center.title: Scoold as a Support Center
support_center.subtitle: Reduce ticket volume by turning repeat support questions into self-serve answers.
support_center.description: The best support ticket is the one that never gets opened. Scoold's public-facing Q&A lets customers find answers themselves while your team builds a growing library of solutions.

features.title: Searchable Self-service
features.description: Customers search before they submit. Reduce tier-1 tickets by up to 40%.

features.title: Expert Escalation
features.description: Unanswered questions can be escalated to the right subject-matter expert automatically.

features.title: Customer-facing or Internal
features.description: Public Q&A for customers, private space for internal team escalations — or both.

features.title: Analytics & Insights
features.description: See which questions get asked most. Identify gaps in your product documentation.

qa_platform.title: Scoold as a Q&A Platform
qa_platform.subtitle: The Stack Overflow experience, running entirely on your own infrastructure.
qa_platform.description: Scoold was purpose-built as a Q&A platform. Every feature — voting, accepted answers, tags, reputation — mirrors the experience your team already knows from Stack Overflow, without the subscription cost.

features.title: Voting & Accepted Answers
features.description: The Q&A workflow your team already knows. Upvotes, downvotes, and accepted answers surface the best content.

features.title: Tag-based Organization
features.description: Tag questions by technology, topic, or team. Tag wikis provide context for every tag.

features.title: Reputation System
features.description: Reputation scores reflect real contribution. High-rep users earn moderation privileges.

features.title: Unanswered Queue
features.description: Dedicated view for unanswered questions ensures nothing falls through the cracks.

cta.label: Switch from Stack Overflow for Teams

knowledge_sharing.title: Scoold as a Knowledge Sharing Platform
knowledge_sharing.subtitle: Break down information silos and create a culture of sharing across your entire organization.
knowledge_sharing.description: Knowledge hoarded in individual inboxes, private docs, and Slack DMs is knowledge lost. Scoold creates a culture where sharing is the default — and where every insight is findable forever.

features.title: Cross-team Visibility
features.description: Break down department silos. Make knowledge visible across the entire organization.

features.title: Recognition & Reward
features.description: Gamification mechanics reward sharing. Top contributors are celebrated.

features.title: Onboarding Acceleration
features.description: New hires find answers from day one. Reduce time-to-productivity by weeks.

features.title: Living Documentation
features.description: Unlike wikis, Scoold content stays current — answers get updated when things change.

stack_overflow.title: Scoold vs Stack Overflow for Teams
stack_overflow.subtitle: Same Q&A experience. No subscription. Your data, your infrastructure.
stack_overflow.intro: Stack Overflow for Teams is a great product, but it comes with per-seat monthly fees that add up fast, and your data lives in their cloud. Scoold gives you the same battle-tested Q&A format — self-hosted, with a one-time license.

apache_answers.title: Scoold vs Apache Answer
apache_answers.subtitle: Two strong open-source Q&A platforms — here's how they compare.
apache_answers.intro: Apache Answer is a well-built open-source Q&A platform under the Apache Software Foundation. Scoold offers comparable core features with a stronger enterprise story: Pro edition with LDAP/SAML, a hosted cloud option, and a mature Java stack.

discourse.title: Scoold vs Discourse
discourse.subtitle: Q&A or forum? When structured answers matter more than conversation threads.
discourse.intro: Discourse is an excellent forum platform optimized for long-form discussion threads. Scoold is purpose-built for Q&A — where finding the best answer quickly is the goal. Both are open-source and self-hostable.

teams.title: Scoold + Microsoft Teams
teams.subtitle: Ask questions from Teams. Get answers in Scoold. Build a permanent knowledge base.
teams.description: Stop losing knowledge in Teams chat threads. With the Scoold + Microsoft Teams integration, questions from your Teams channels are automatically posted to Scoold, where they get answered and indexed permanently.

features.title: Post to Scoold from Teams
features.description: Use a slash command or bot mention to post a question directly to Scoold without leaving Teams.

features.title: Notifications in Teams
features.description: Get notified in Teams when your Scoold question is answered or commented on.

features.title: Knowledge Capture
features.description: Every Teams conversation that ends with a Scoold answer becomes a permanent, searchable resource.

setup_steps: Install the Scoold connector in Microsoft Teams admin center
Configure your Scoold Pro instance with the Teams webhook URL
Set up notification channels for new questions and answers
Start posting — questions flow automatically from Teams to Scoold

slack.title: Scoold + Slack
slack.subtitle: Turn Slack questions into permanent knowledge — automatically.
slack.description: Questions asked in Slack evaporate after 90 days on free plans. Scoold captures them permanently. Set up the integration once and every question your team asks in Slack has a home in your knowledge base.

features.title: Slash Command
features.description: Use /scoold ask to post questions to Scoold directly from any Slack channel.

features.title: Answer Notifications
features.description: Get a Slack DM when your question is answered on Scoold.

features.title: Channel Digests
features.description: Weekly digest of unanswered questions posted to a designated Slack channel.

setup_steps: Create a Slack App and get your bot token and webhook URL
Add the Slack webhook URL in Scoold Pro settings
Configure which Slack channels to monitor or post to
Install the Slack App to your workspace

mattermost.title: Scoold + Mattermost
mattermost.subtitle: Self-hosted chat meets self-hosted knowledge base.
mattermost.description: If your organization runs Mattermost for secure, self-hosted chat, Scoold is the perfect companion for knowledge management. Both run on your infrastructure — complete data sovereignty.

features.title: Incoming Webhooks
features.description: Scoold posts new questions and answers to configured Mattermost channels via incoming webhooks.

features.title: Slash Commands
features.description: Ask questions from Mattermost and have them automatically posted to Scoold.

features.title: Full Self-hosted Stack
features.description: Mattermost + Scoold = a completely self-hosted communication and knowledge management stack.

setup_steps: Create an Incoming Webhook in Mattermost
Add the webhook URL in your Scoold Pro configuration
Create a Slash Command in Mattermost pointing to your Scoold instance
Test by posting a question from Mattermost

zapier.title: Scoold + Zapier
zapier.subtitle: Connect Scoold to 5,000+ apps — no code required.
zapier.description: Zapier connects Scoold's REST API to thousands of other tools. Automate workflows like notifying Jira when a new question is tagged 'bug', or adding unanswered questions to your team's project management tool.

features.title: Trigger on New Questions
features.description: Fire Zapier automations whenever a new question is posted, answered, or tagged.

features.title: Push to Any Tool
features.description: Route Scoold events to Jira, Trello, Notion, Airtable, HubSpot, or any Zapier-supported app.

features.title: Automate Moderation
features.description: Use Zapier to auto-flag questions, assign experts, or create follow-up tasks.

setup_steps: Create a Zapier account (free tier works)
Connect the Scoold Zapier app using your API key
Choose your trigger (new question, new answer, new user, etc.)
Connect to your target app and configure the action

open_source.title: Open source and proud of it
open_source.subtitle: Scoold has been open source since day one. We believe in transparency, community ownership, and freedom from vendor lock-in.

benefits.title: Security you can verify
benefits.description: The source code is public. You can audit every line, run your own security scans, and verify there are no backdoors or unexpected data collection.

benefits.title: No vendor lock-in
benefits.description: Your data, your infrastructure, your rules. Migrate your data anytime using the REST API. No proprietary formats or walled gardens.

benefits.title: Community driven
benefits.description: Feature ideas, bug reports, and pull requests are welcome from anyone. The roadmap is shaped by the community, not just business interests.

benefits.title: Deploy anywhere
benefits.description: Apache 2.0 means you can deploy Scoold to any environment — cloud, on-premises, air-gapped — with no royalties or licensing fees for the Community edition.

cloud.title: Scoold Cloud
cloud.subtitle: All the power of Scoold Pro, hosted and managed by us.
cloud.description: Skip the infrastructure management. Scoold Cloud gives you a fully managed Scoold Pro instance — we handle deployments, updates, backups, and security patches. You focus on building your knowledge base.

features.title: Up in minutes
features.description: Your Scoold instance is provisioned instantly. No server setup, no Docker commands.

features.title: Managed security
features.description: Automatic security patches, TLS certificates, and regular backups included.

features.title: Auto-scaling
features.description: Your instance scales automatically with your team. No capacity planning required.

features.title: Global CDN
features.description: Static assets served from a global CDN for fast page loads worldwide.

features.title: Automatic updates
features.description: Always on the latest version of Scoold Pro. Zero-downtime rolling updates.

features.title: Dedicated support
features.description: Cloud customers get priority support with a dedicated customer success contact.

impressum.address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to work together? We'd love to hear from you.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.content: Scoold.com collects minimal personal data necessary to operate the website. This includes standard server log data (IP addresses, browser type, pages visited) for security and analytics purposes. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.content: This site uses essential cookies for session management and preferences. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

sections.heading: Third-party Services
sections.content: We may use third-party services for analytics (privacy-focused, GDPR-compliant) and payment processing. These services have their own privacy policies.

sections.heading: Data Retention
sections.content: Server logs are retained for 30 days for security purposes. Contact information submitted through our contact form is retained only as long as necessary to respond to your inquiry.

sections.heading: Your Rights (GDPR)
sections.content: EU/EEA residents have rights under GDPR including the right to access, correct, delete, or export personal data. Contact us at privacy@erudika.com to exercise these rights.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.content: For privacy-related inquiries, contact Erudika Ltd. at privacy@erudika.com or by post at: Erudika Ltd., 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ, UK.

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.content: By accessing scoold.com, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use this site.

sections.heading: License
sections.content: Scoold (Community edition) is open source software licensed under the Apache 2.0 License. Scoold Pro is commercial software governed by the Scoold Pro EULA.

sections.heading: Permitted Use
sections.content: You may use this site to download, evaluate, and purchase Scoold software for your own use in accordance with the applicable license terms.

sections.heading: Prohibited Use
sections.content: You may not use this site for unlawful purposes, to transmit malicious code, or to violate the rights of others.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
sections.content: Scoold is provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind. Erudika Ltd. disclaims all warranties, express or implied, to the extent permitted by law.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Disputes shall be resolved in the courts of England and Wales.

download.title: Download Scoold
download.subtitle: Free to download, free to deploy. Apache 2.0 open source.

options.title: Docker (recommended)
options.description: The fastest way to get started. Pull the Docker image and run.

options.title: GitHub Releases
options.description: Download the latest JAR file from the GitHub releases page.

options.title: Maven / Gradle
options.description: Add Scoold as a dependency in your Java project.

requirements: 512 MB RAM minimum (2 GB recommended for production)
Any Linux, macOS, or Windows server
